hooks.command: if ! curl -sf http://localhost:3456/health >/dev/null 2>&1; then if command -v surfagent >/dev/null 2>&1; then mkdir -p /tmp/surfagent-plugin && nohup surfagent start >/tmp/surfagent-plugin/server.log 2>&1 & disown; echo '[surfagent] starting server in background (logs: /tmp/surfagent-plugin/server.log)'; else echo '[surfagent] CLI not found. Install: npm install -g surfagent'; fi; fi
